title: e2e "Setup local registry" build step flakey
body:
On PRs to main e2e tests are flakey on "Setup local registry"
```
Run # Run a registry.
Unable to find image 'registry:2' locally
docker: Error response from daemon: Head "https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/library/registry/manifests/2": received unexpected HTTP status: 500 Internal Server Error

Run 'docker run --help' for more information
Error: Process completed with exit code 125.
```

https://github.com/dapr/dapr/actions/runs/23558437544/job/68591525649?pr=9685

seen in pr https://github.com/dapr/dapr/pull/9685
